# elpic/templates

> Reusable blueprint templates for containers and CI/CD workflows. Render production-ready Dockerfiles and GitHub Actions from a single setup.bp.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of all blueprint templates, categories, and the render command.
- [Python Container](/templates/containers-python): Multi-stage prod + dev Dockerfiles for Python.
- [Go Integration](/templates/actions-github-integration-go): PR integration workflow for Go projects.
- [Node Integration](/templates/actions-github-integration-node): PR integration workflow for Node.js/TypeScript.
- [Python Integration](/templates/actions-github-integration-python): PR integration workflow for Python.
- [Python Package Publish](/templates/actions-github-delivery-python): Build and publish Python packages to PyPI, GitHub Packages, or JFrog Artifactory.
- [GitHub Release Publish](/templates/actions-github-delivery-github-release): Build and create a GitHub Release with artifacts.
- [Blueprint Drift Check](/templates/actions-github-blueprint-check): GitHub Actions PR check for blueprint drift.
